goal: Each finding carries severity, confidence, file, line, user impact, and validation method; soft labels (Nit/Optional/FYI) appear only after blocking findings and never hide correctness defects.

input.diff: a diff with one correctness bug and one nit

assertions: controlflow-review SKILL.md requires each finding labeled with severity, confidence, file, line, user impact, and validation method.
Nit, Optional, and FYI may appear only after blocking findings.
A missing-test finding must not be marked FYI when the untested behavior can regress.
A blocker must carry validation evidence or an explicit unconfirmed-risk label.
Output is structured text, not raw JSON.
